targets.rawSql:
SELECT substring(convert(varchar,getdate(),121),1,7) [기준월], MAX(c.TITLE) OVER(PARTITION BY B.DPTNO) [부서], FORMAT(sum(a.PRICE) OVER(PARTITION BY B.DPTNO), N'#,0') [총사용금액] 
, FORMAT(A.PRICE, N'#,0') [금액], A.MEMBERNM [사용자], A.CONTENT [목적], A.SHOPNAME [장소], CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.USEDATE,23) [사용일자]
, CASE WHEN A.CONTENT LIKE '%간담회%' AND A.CONTENT NOT LIKE '%생일%' THEN '간담회'
       WHEN A.CONTENT LIKE '%회식%' AND A.CONTENT NOT LIKE '%생일%' THEN '회식' 
       WHEN A.CONTENT LIKE '%책임당직%' THEN '책임당직' 
       ELSE 'NA' END AS [구분자]
  FROM (SELECT Z.USEDATE, Z.MEMBERID, Z.PRICE, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Z.GROUPID ORDER BY Z.TARGETMBRID DESC) RNK 
             -- 
             , Z.MEMBERNM, Z.CONTENT, SHOPNAME
        FROM OVERTIMEPRICE Z with (nolock)
        -- 이번달
        WHERE 1=1
        AND  Z.USEDATE  BETWEEN CONVERT(DATETIME,DATEADD(D,-DAY(CAST(CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))+1,CAST(CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))) AND GETDATE()
     --    and z.usedate >= '2023-05-01'     
        )  a, MEMBER b, DPT c
 WHERE 1=1
   AND RNK = 1
   AND A.MEMBERID = B.ID
   AND B.DPTNO = C.ID 
   AND C.TITLE IN ($PartNm)

SELECT /*GETDATE() AS WORK_DT, */PIVOT_RESULT.* 
  FROM (SELECT D.TITLE AS PART_NM, M.MEMBERNM AS MEM_NM
             --, ISNULL(W.TITLE,'정상출근') AS WORK_TYPE--, S.CONTENT, S.CONTENT2
             --, CASE WHEN W.TITLE IS NULL                             THEN '정상근무' 
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '점검'                            THEN '정상근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '근무' AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '교육 및 세미나'                  THEN '교육'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('외근','출장')                  THEN '외근'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('휴가','휴무(연차/대휴)')       THEN '휴가'
             --       ELSE '기타일정'
             --   END AS WORK_TYPE
             , CASE WHEN W.ID IS NULL                        THEN '정상근무' 
                    WHEN W.ID = 6                            THEN '정상근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 5 AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 2                            THEN '교육'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (4,8)                       THEN '외근'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (1,3)                       THEN '휴가'
                    ELSE '기타일정'
                END AS WORK_TYPE
          FROM MEMBER (NOLOCK) M
    INNER JOIN DPT (NOLOCK) D
            ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
           AND D.TITLE IN ($PartNm)
    LEFT OUTER JOIN SCHEDULE (NOLOCK) S
            ON M.ID = S.MEMBERID
           AND GETDATE() BETWEEN S.STARTDATE AND S.ENDDATE
    LEFT OUTER JOIN DUTY (NOLOCK) W
            ON S.DUTYID = W.ID
         WHERE M.USEYN = 1
       ) AS RESULT
--PIVOT(COUNT(MEM_NM) FOR PART_NM IN(['교육 및 세미나'],['근무'],['기타일정'],['외근'],['점검'],['정상출근'],['출장'],['휴가'],['휴무(연차/대휴)'])) AS PIVOT_RESULT
PIVOT(COUNT(MEM_NM) FOR WORK_TYPE IN([정상근무],[재택근무],[교육],[외근],[휴가],[기타일정])) AS PIVOT_RESULT
-- PART CODE는 따로 SELECT 하지 않음
ORDER BY CASE WHEN PART_NM = 'MD'       THEN 1
              WHEN PART_NM = '마케팅'   THEN 2
              WHEN PART_NM = '경영지원' THEN 3
              WHEN PART_NM = '재무'     THEN 4
              WHEN PART_NM = 'POS'      THEN 5
              WHEN PART_NM = '상품권'   THEN 6
              WHEN PART_NM = '인프라'   THEN 7
              ELSE 99 -- 매니저
          END

SELECT D.TITLE AS PART_NM, M.MEMBERNM AS MEM_NM
             --, ISNULL(W.TITLE,'정상출근') AS WORK_TYPE
             --, CASE WHEN W.TITLE IS NULL                             THEN '정상근무' 
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '점검'                            THEN '정상근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '근무' AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '교육 및 세미나'                  THEN '교육'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('외근','출장')                  THEN '외근'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('휴가','휴무(연차/대휴)')       THEN '휴가'
             --       ELSE '기타일정'
             --   END AS WORK_TYPE
             , CASE WHEN W.ID IS NULL                        THEN '정상근무' 
                    WHEN W.ID = 6                            THEN '정상근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 5 AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 2                            THEN '교육'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (4,8)                       THEN '외근'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (1,3)                       THEN '휴가'
                --     ELSE '기타일정'
                    ELSE S.CONTENT + ' ' + S.CONTENT2
                END AS WORK_TYPE
             , S.CONTENT + ' ' + S.CONTENT2 as Detail
          FROM MEMBER (NOLOCK) M
    INNER JOIN DPT (NOLOCK) D
            ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN SCHEDULE (NOLOCK) S
            ON M.ID = S.MEMBERID
           AND GETDATE()-1 BETWEEN S.STARTDATE AND S.ENDDATE
    LEFT OUTER JOIN DUTY (NOLOCK) W
            ON S.DUTYID = W.ID
         WHERE M.USEYN = 1
           AND D.TITLE in($PartNm)
           AND M.MEMBERNM in($MemNm)
 ORDER BY CASE WHEN D.TITLE = 'MD'       THEN 1
               WHEN D.TITLE = '마케팅'   THEN 2
               WHEN D.TITLE = '경영지원' THEN 3
               WHEN D.TITLE = '재무'     THEN 4
               WHEN D.TITLE = 'POS'      THEN 5
               WHEN D.TITLE = '상품권'   THEN 6
               WHEN D.TITLE = '인프라'   THEN 7
               ELSE 99 -- 매니저
           END
          , M.MEMBERID

with tbl_date as (
SELECT
        NUMBER M_NUM, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01') + NUMBER-1 as dt,
        DATEPART(DW, CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01')) + NUMBER-1) M_PART,
        DATENAME(DW, CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01')) + NUMBER-1) M_NAME,
        DATEDIFF(WK, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01'), DATEADD(D, NUMBER-1, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01'))) WK,
        (CASE CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01')) + NUMBER - 1, 112)
         WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) THEN ' (오늘)' ELSE '' END) TODAY
    FROM MASTER..SPT_VALUES
    WHERE TYPE='P'
    AND NUMBER BETWEEN 1 AND DATEDIFF(D, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01'), DATEADD(MM, 1, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01')))
)
SELECT  
    -- T1.WK,
    '일' = MAX(CASE M_PART WHEN '1' THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR,M_NUM)+TODAY+CHAR(13)+CHAR(10)+IIF(WORK_TYPE='정상근무','점검',Detail) ELSE '' END),
    '월' = MAX(CASE M_PART WHEN '2' THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR,M_NUM)+TODAY+CHAR(13)+CHAR(10)+ISNULL(WORK_TYPE,'정상근무')            ELSE '' END),
    '화' = MAX(CASE M_PART WHEN '3' THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR,M_NUM)+TODAY+CHAR(13)+CHAR(10)+ISNULL(WORK_TYPE,'정상근무')            ELSE '' END),
    '수' = MAX(CASE M_PART WHEN '4' THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR,M_NUM)+TODAY+CHAR(13)+CHAR(10)+ISNULL(WORK_TYPE,'정상근무')            ELSE '' END),
    '목' = MAX(CASE M_PART WHEN '5' THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR,M_NUM)+TODAY+CHAR(13)+CHAR(10)+ISNULL(WORK_TYPE,'정상근무')            ELSE '' END),
    '금' = MAX(CASE M_PART WHEN '6' THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR,M_NUM)+TODAY+CHAR(13)+CHAR(10)+ISNULL(WORK_TYPE,'정상근무')            ELSE '' END),
    '토' = MAX(CASE M_PART WHEN '7' THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR,M_NUM)+TODAY+CHAR(13)+CHAR(10)+IIF(WORK_TYPE='정상근무','점검',Detail) ELSE '' END)
FROM TBL_DATE T1 with (nolock)
JOIN MASTER..SPT_VALUES T2 with (nolock)
  ON T1.WK = T2.NUMBER
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),S.STARTDATE,121) AS WORK_ST_DT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),S.ENDDATE-1,121) AS WORK_END_DT, 
                          D.TITLE AS PART_NM, M.MEMBERNM AS MEM_NM
             --, ISNULL(W.TITLE,'정상출근') AS WORK_TYPE
             --, CASE WHEN W.TITLE IS NULL                             THEN '정상근무' 
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '점검'                            THEN '정상근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '근무' AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '교육 및 세미나'                  THEN '교육'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('외근','출장')                  THEN '외근'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('휴가','휴무(연차/대휴)')       THEN '휴가'
             --       ELSE '기타일정'
             --   END AS WORK_TYPE
             , CASE WHEN W.ID IS NULL                        THEN '정상근무' 
                    WHEN W.ID = 6                            THEN '정상근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 5 AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 2                            THEN '교육'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (4,8)                       THEN '외근'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (1,3)                       THEN '휴가'
                    ELSE '기타일정'
                END AS WORK_TYPE
             , S.CONTENT + ' ' + S.CONTENT2 as Detail
          FROM MEMBER (NOLOCK) M
    INNER JOIN DPT (NOLOCK) D
            ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN SCHEDULE (NOLOCK) S
            ON M.ID = S.MEMBERID
           AND S.STARTDATE between CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01')) and DATEADD(MM, 1, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01'))
    LEFT OUTER JOIN DUTY (NOLOCK) W
            ON S.DUTYID = W.ID
         WHERE M.USEYN = 1
          -- AND D.TITLE in('MD','마케팅','경영지원','재무','POS','상품권','인프라','영업1담당','영업2담당','지원1담당','지원2담당')
           AND M.MEMBERNM = '$IndivisualNm'
 --ORDER BY S.STARTDATE DESC
 ) AS WORK
 ON T1.DT BETWEEN WORK.WORK_ST_DT AND WORK.WORK_END_DT
WHERE
    T2.TYPE = 'P'
GROUP BY T1.WK
ORDER BY T1.WK

with tbl_date as (
SELECT
        NUMBER M_NUM, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01') + NUMBER-1 as DT,
        DATEPART(DW, CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01')) + NUMBER-1) M_PART,
        DATENAME(DW, CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01')) + NUMBER-1) M_NAME,
        DATEDIFF(WK, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01'), DATEADD(D, NUMBER-1, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01'))) WK
    FROM MASTER..SPT_VALUES
    WHERE TYPE='P'
    AND NUMBER BETWEEN 1 AND DATEDIFF(D, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01'), DATEADD(MM, 1, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01')))
)
SELECT  
    -- T1.DT as time, 
    DISTINCT 
    CASE M_PART WHEN '1' THEN IIF(WORK_TYPE='정상근무','점검',Detail)                    
                WHEN '2' THEN ISNULL(WORK_TYPE,'정상근무')        
                WHEN '3' THEN ISNULL(WORK_TYPE,'정상근무')        
                WHEN '4' THEN ISNULL(WORK_TYPE,'정상근무')        
                WHEN '5' THEN ISNULL(WORK_TYPE,'정상근무')        
                WHEN '6' THEN ISNULL(WORK_TYPE,'정상근무')        
                WHEN '7' THEN IIF(WORK_TYPE='정상근무','점검',Detail)             
                ELSE '' END as WORK_TYPE,
                WORK.DETAIL AS DEATIL,
                WORK.WORK_ST_DT,
                WORK.WORK_END_DT
FROM TBL_DATE T1
JOIN MASTER..SPT_VALUES T2
  ON T1.WK = T2.NUMBER
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),S.STARTDATE,121) AS WORK_ST_DT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),S.ENDDATE-1,121) AS WORK_END_DT, 
                          D.TITLE AS PART_NM, M.MEMBERNM AS MEM_NM
             --, ISNULL(W.TITLE,'정상출근') AS WORK_TYPE
             --, CASE WHEN W.TITLE IS NULL                             THEN '정상근무' 
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '점검'                            THEN '정상근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '근무' AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '교육 및 세미나'                  THEN '교육'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('외근','출장')                  THEN '외근'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('휴가','휴무(연차/대휴)')       THEN '휴가'
             --       ELSE '기타일정'
             --   END AS WORK_TYPE
             , CASE WHEN W.ID IS NULL                        THEN '정상근무' 
                    WHEN W.ID = 6                            THEN '정상근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 5 AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 2                            THEN '교육'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (4,8)                       THEN '외근'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (1,3)                       THEN '휴가'
                    -- ELSE '기타일정'
                    ELSE S.CONTENT + ' ' + S.CONTENT2
                END AS WORK_TYPE
             , S.CONTENT + ' ' + S.CONTENT2 as Detail
          FROM MEMBER (NOLOCK) M
    INNER JOIN DPT (NOLOCK) D
            ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN SCHEDULE (NOLOCK) S
            ON M.ID = S.MEMBERID
           AND S.STARTDATE between CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01')) and DATEADD(MM, 1, CONVERT(DATETIME, SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,8) + '01'))
    LEFT OUTER JOIN DUTY (NOLOCK) W
            ON S.DUTYID = W.ID
         WHERE M.USEYN = 1
          -- AND D.TITLE in('MD','마케팅','경영지원','재무','POS','상품권','인프라','영업1담당','영업2담당','지원1담당','지원2담당')
           AND M.MEMBERNM = '$IndivisualNm'
           and content <> '공휴일'
 --ORDER BY S.STARTDATE DESC
 ) AS WORK
 ON T1.DT BETWEEN WORK.WORK_ST_DT AND WORK.WORK_END_DT
WHERE
    T2.TYPE = 'P'

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),S.STARTDATE,121) AS STARTDATE, D.TITLE AS PART_NM, M.MEMBERNM AS MEM_NM
             --, ISNULL(W.TITLE,'정상출근') AS WORK_TYPE
             --, CASE WHEN W.TITLE IS NULL                             THEN '정상근무' 
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '점검'                            THEN '정상근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '근무' AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE = '교육 및 세미나'                  THEN '교육'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('외근','출장')                  THEN '외근'
             --       WHEN W.TITLE IN ('휴가','휴무(연차/대휴)')       THEN '휴가'
             --       ELSE '기타일정'
             --   END AS WORK_TYPE
             , CASE WHEN W.ID IS NULL                        THEN '정상근무' 
                    WHEN W.ID = 6                            THEN '정상근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 5 AND S.CONTENT = '재택근무' THEN '재택근무'
                    WHEN W.ID = 2                            THEN '교육'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (4,8)                       THEN '외근'
                    WHEN W.ID IN (1,3)                       THEN '휴가'
                    ELSE '기타일정'
                END AS WORK_TYPE
             , S.CONTENT + ' ' + S.CONTENT2 as Detail
          FROM MEMBER (NOLOCK) M
    INNER JOIN DPT (NOLOCK) D
            ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN SCHEDULE (NOLOCK) S
            ON M.ID = S.MEMBERID
           AND S.STARTDATE between $__timeFrom() and $__timeTo()
    LEFT OUTER JOIN DUTY (NOLOCK) W
            ON S.DUTYID = W.ID
         WHERE M.USEYN = 1
          -- AND D.TITLE in($PartNm)
           AND M.MEMBERNM = '$IndivisualNm'
 ORDER BY S.STARTDATE DESC

list.definition:
SELECT TITLE AS PART_NM 
  FROM  DPT (nolock) D 
WHERE TITLE <> '관리자'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN TITLE = 'MD'       THEN 1
              WHEN TITLE = '마케팅'   THEN 2
              WHEN TITLE = '경영지원' THEN 3
              WHEN TITLE = '재무'     THEN 4
              WHEN TITLE = 'POS'      THEN 5
              WHEN TITLE = '상품권'   THEN 6
              WHEN TITLE = '인프라'   THEN 7
              ELSE 99 -- 매니저
          END
list.name: PartNm
list.query:
SELECT TITLE AS PART_NM 
  FROM  DPT (nolock) D 
WHERE TITLE <> '관리자'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN TITLE = 'MD'       THEN 1
              WHEN TITLE = '마케팅'   THEN 2
              WHEN TITLE = '경영지원' THEN 3
              WHEN TITLE = '재무'     THEN 4
              WHEN TITLE = 'POS'      THEN 5
              WHEN TITLE = '상품권'   THEN 6
              WHEN TITLE = '인프라'   THEN 7
              ELSE 99 -- 매니저
          END

list.definition:
SELECT M.MEMBERNM
  FROM MEMBER (NOLOCK) M
 INNER JOIN DPT (NOLOCK) D
    ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
 WHERE M.USEYN = 1
    AND D.TITLE in($PartNm)
 ORDER BY CASE WHEN D.TITLE = 'MD'       THEN 1
               WHEN D.TITLE = '마케팅'   THEN 2
               WHEN D.TITLE = '경영지원' THEN 3
               WHEN D.TITLE = '재무'     THEN 4
               WHEN D.TITLE = 'POS'      THEN 5
               WHEN D.TITLE = '상품권'   THEN 6
               WHEN D.TITLE = '인프라'   THEN 7
               ELSE 99 -- 매니저
           END
list.name: MemNm
list.query:
SELECT M.MEMBERNM
  FROM MEMBER (NOLOCK) M
 INNER JOIN DPT (NOLOCK) D
    ON M.DPTNO = D.ID
 WHERE M.USEYN = 1
    AND D.TITLE in($PartNm)
 ORDER BY CASE WHEN D.TITLE = 'MD'       THEN 1
               WHEN D.TITLE = '마케팅'   THEN 2
               WHEN D.TITLE = '경영지원' THEN 3
               WHEN D.TITLE = '재무'     THEN 4
               WHEN D.TITLE = 'POS'      THEN 5
               WHEN D.TITLE = '상품권'   THEN 6
               WHEN D.TITLE = '인프라'   THEN 7
               ELSE 99 -- 매니저
           END
